indian_trade_portal.name: Indian Trade Portal
indian_trade_portal.description: Official portal for Indian trade tariff lookups
indian_trade_portal.search_capability: Allows searching for ITC HS codes and corresponding customs duties
indian_trade_portal.search_format: Enter 2 to 6 digits to locate codes

features.hs_code_lookup: Search by code or product name
features.country_selection: Select country to find applicable tariff rates

indian_trade_portal.bulk_download: Not explicitly available through portal interface

cbic.name: Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC)
cbic.limitations: Website requires JavaScript; full content not accessible via standard fetching

access_methods.search_interface: Interactive online search at Indian Trade Portal

data_availability.countries_in_system: Major trading partners queryable through portal
data_availability.coverage: Indian applied tariffs for all product categories

limitations.bulk_download_not_available: Cannot download entire tariff schedule programmatically
limitations.documentation_limited: Limited information about technical data structure
limitations.access_challenges: CBIC website requires JavaScript and interactive access

assessment.importance: HIGH - India is a major trading nation with significant non-tariff measures
assessment.recommendation: Secondary priority - will require contact with CBIC for bulk download options or web scraping of search results
